title: Altercraft
description: A Lightweight Modpack that turns Minecraft into a RPG!
body:
![Altercraft Logo! Made with Minecraft Title Generator in Blockbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/328a7827c9481c15fd6cd394efb61094a6fe1356.png)

You wake up in the middle of an island, you try to swim, but your skin starts burning!\
You remember that you are a descendant of the Endermans, Enderians, You can not swim.\
There is nothing on the island, and yet so much in the world, You dig down to find a cave.\
You explore it to find Zombies, Skeletons, Spiders, Endermans, Creepers and... What is th-
___
- Features
___

- 🎮 **New Gameplay** : Enhanced Combat with New Weapons & Armors with different playstyles, Artifacts enhancing even more your gameplay!

- ✈️ **Species** : Every Species has its unique Pros and Cons, Like Enderians, They reach further and teleport, but they are Hydrophobic.

- 🗺️ **World** : In the Overworld there is several new biomes with seasons, in the Nether & End there are new biomes too, and new foes, so be prepared.

- 🩸 **Hallucinations...?** : You begin hallucinating overtime, seeing things like players and a urban legend called "Herobrine".

**Altercraft** aims to balance Features and Optimization, So give it a chance! why not?

___
- Others
___

<details>
<summary>Credits / Important Stuff</summary>

By downloading this Modpack, you agree that **You will not redistribute the project.** _Security Measures only_.\
Also You can use the Modpack in videos or lives! Dont be shy, I know you probably wont\

Special Thanks to the Origins Developers! Origins basically holds this Modpack together!

This Modpack is Discontinued, Unless I really want to update Altercraft, there will not be any more updates now.

</details>
